zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland於大約1122年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德蒙尼肯達姆時，她的父親Arnoud Spiker van Waterland34歲，母親Imme van Holland33歲。她於大約1150年與Dirck van Persijn在荷蘭努-拉藍德蒙尼肯達姆結婚。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland于大约1122年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德蒙尼肯達姆时，她的父亲Arnoud Spiker van Waterland34岁，母亲Imme van Holland33岁。她于大约1150年与Dirck van Persijn在荷兰努-拉藍德蒙尼肯達姆结婚。

nameMeanings.name: Spiker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Spyker
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Dirk, Kryn.
metonymic occupational name for a nailsmith, from spijker ‘nail’.

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Waterland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): probably of Dutch origin, from the region of Waterland in North Holland, centred on the town of Broek. This is probably one of the surnames brought to Lincolnshire by Dutch drainage engineers at the end of the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland was born about 1122, in Monnickendam, North Holland, Netherlands, her father, Arnoud Spiker van Waterland, was 34 and her mother, Imme van Holland, was 33. She married Dirck van Persijn about 1150, in Monnickendam, North Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland est née environ 1122, à Monnickendam, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Arnoud Spiker van Waterland, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Imme van Holland, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Dirck van Persijn environ 1150, à Monnickendam, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland um 1122 in Monnickendam, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnoud Spiker van Waterland 34 und ihre Mutter Imme van Holland 33. Sie hat um 1150 in Monnickendam, Nord-Holland, Niederlande Dirck van Persijn geheiratet.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland è nata il circa 1122 nel Monnickendam, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Arnoud Spiker van Waterland, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Imme van Holland, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Dirck van Persijn circa 1150, nel Monnickendam, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterlandが約1122年にオランダノオルド-hオランドモニクエンダムで生まれた時，父Arnoud Spiker van Waterlandは34歳，母Imme van Hollandは33歳であった。約1150年にオランダノオルド-hオランドモニクエンダムでDirck van Persijnと結婚した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland(이)가 대략 1122년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 몬이c켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnoud Spiker van Waterland(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Imme van Holland(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1150년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 몬이c켄다에서 Dirck van Persijn(와)과 결혼했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland nasceu aproximadamente 1122, em Monnickendam, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arnoud Spiker van Waterland, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Imme van Holland, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Dirck van Persijn aproximadamente 1150, em Monnickendam, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland родилась около 1122 г. в местности монниккендам, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Arnoud Spiker van Waterland было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Imme van Holland, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dirck van Persijn около 1150 г. в местности монниккендам, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland nació aproximadamente 1122, en Monnickendam, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Arnoud Spiker van Waterland, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Imme van Holland, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Dirck van Persijn aproximadamente 1150, en Monnickendam, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos.
